response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience with embedded networking, Linux kernel modifications, and security technologies (e.g., MACsec, IEEE 802.1X) required for this role. While they have strong software development skills in high-level languages (JavaScript, TypeScript, D, etc.), their expertise does not align closely with the embedded firmware and network security focus of the position.
strengths: Strong software development background with experience in multiple languages and paradigms
Familiarity with Linux and system-level programming (C/C++)
Proven ability to deliver complex projects and contribute to open-source initiatives
concerns: No demonstrated experience with embedded systems, firmware development, or chip-vendor SDKs
Lacks direct experience with security technologies (e.g., MACsec, authentication systems) or networking protocols (NETCONF, SNMP)
No evidence of native-level Japanese proficiency or experience working in Japan
